chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 553 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.08.2023. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 13149/2022. FOR HEARING OF M.A. 3034/2018. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 13150/2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 7351/2019. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 7339/2019. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Abbass Sangi Assistant Attorney General. ---- Petitioners seeks a declaration that respondents’ action in declining the promotion of the petitioners from BPS-16 to BPS-17 as null and void ab initio. We have not been assisted properly by learned D.A.G, however, we have perused the file. In no way the questions that concerns with the promotion could be dealt with under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. The petitioner claimed to be an employee in BPS-16 grade and he claimed that he was not promoted to BPS-17. Such question could not be raised under the hierarchy of Law especially directly by exhausting the remedy under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petition merits no consideration and is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
